name: agent-assh
description: SSH workflow helper for LLM agents

scripts.check: test -z "$(gofmt -l .)" && go vet ./... && go test ./... && npm run smoke && npm pack --dry-run && npx --yes markdownlint-cli2 --config .markdownlint-cli2.yaml README.md README.en.md AGENT_INSTRUCTIONS.md SYSTEM_PROMPT_snippet.md
scripts.check:release: npm run check && npm run release:contract && go run github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2/cmd/golangci-lint@v2.12.2 run && go run github.com/goreleaser/goreleaser/v2@latest check
